name: stack-add forces a real rule-surface namespace into the in-scope set regardless of classifier inference
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add aws --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["namespaces"].include?("aws") ? 0:1)' && echo stack-forces-scope 1>&2
